required_preferences.fact: Suspends twice-monthly fishing trips with his brother until wife's mother recovers — avoids leaving home early mornings during caregiving period

supersedes.fact: Goes fishing twice a month at a local reservoir with his brother — always wakes up before sunrise for these trips

required_preferences.fact: Pursues portable model train design sketches or research in his hotel room during downtime abroad — cannot work on physical models left at home

supersedes.fact: Works on model trains in the garage on rainy afternoons — never brings hobby projects into the main house

required_preferences.fact: Spends migraine recovery evenings in a dim, quiet room, avoiding family movie nights or hobby projects involving screens or bright lights
Schedules weekly evening video calls with his wife and children to maintain family connection while abroad — prioritizes these even with a time zone difference
Sets up the kitchen coffee pot every night for automatic brewing — never buys coffee en route to work
Reviews next day’s work schedule and family calendar together with his wife every evening before bed

persona: A 45-year-old operations supervisor at a logistics firm
